creator: rb@nugman.de
text:
Crashplan ceased support for Crashplan Home, so I switched to the "Crashplan for small Business" subscription. After that, the backup with the current 4.8.3 doesn't work anymore. So I contacted Crashplan customer support and they advised me to update to the current version.
Can you please bump the port to the current version 4.9.0? Many thanks in advance!
